---
name: Definition error / stub
about: An enum description is wrong, outdated, a stub, or missing
title: "[Definition] "
labels: documentation, definitions
---

## Which definition
<!-- Path to the file, or the enum ID -->
- File: `definitions/<category>/<ENUM_ID>.md`
- Enum: `MB_ATT_EXAMPLE` / `WP_EXAMPLE` / etc.

## What's wrong
<!-- Pick one or write your own -->
- [ ] It's still a stub (`*Stub — a human needs to document this.*`)
- [ ] The level descriptions are swapped or incorrect
- [ ] The cost / damage / cooldown values don't match the game
- [ ] It describes mechanics that no longer exist in the current MBII build
- [ ] It references attributes/weapons that don't exist
- [ ] The prose is AI-generated marketing-speak with no real information
- [ ] Other: <!-- describe -->

## What it should say
<!-- Either paste a corrected version here, or describe what the correction is.
Include concrete numbers if you have them — ideally from in-game testing. -->

## How do you know this is right?
<!-- Optional but helpful. Did you test it in-game? Read the source? Consult the wiki? -->

<!--
If you want to submit the fix directly instead of filing an issue, see
docs/DEFINITIONS_GUIDE.md — the GitHub web editor route is the fastest
path for a one-file edit.
-->
